composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION. BEAR phase with no drawdown signal. BTC trades -18.5% below its 200d MA without reaching crisis entry threshold (z-score below -3.0). Structural risk filter is active - BTC sits -49.1% below its 1yr high, well past the -35% threshold that blocks entries. Backtest shows BEAR phases without extreme z-scores deliver -6.2% median return at 120d, offering no reliable edge. Stand aside.

The two binding constraints: BTC's 49% discount to its 1yr high triggers structural risk (0/12 such episodes positive at 120d, median -26%), and 30d realised volatility at 35% sits below the 40% threshold required to confirm normal market function. Current z-scores remain near neutral (+1.08 BTC, +0.90 ETH). No entry is indicated until either structural risk clears or z-score drops below -3.0 while both filters pass.
